title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain better than AI at reliably editing documents because AI struggles with the complex internal structure of formats like .docx files. The talk explains that treating documents as software rather than text files is essential for AI to operate at scale while maintaining trustworthiness.
